concept: In Papa's Sushiria To Go!, players operate a sushi restaurant, taking customer orders and preparing sushi rolls through a multi-station workflow involving cooking rice, assembling ingredients, slicing, and adding toppings and sauces. Gameplay is station-based (Order, Rice, Build, Slice, Drink), navigated by tapping tabs, utilizing drag-and-drop, tapping, and swiping gestures for precise food preparation against a customer patience timer.
name: Papa's Sushiria To Go!
